about.title: Identification Card
philosophy: Iteration over perfection: Each documented refinement adds measurable value.
Plugin-first architecture: Extensibility as a design principle, not an afterthought.
Silent documentation: Code speaks for itself, lab notes capture the why.
Performance as feature: Every architectural decision considers end-user impact.
about.note: Each tool's context is detailed in the expedients. Only production-verified capabilities are listed here.

tools.title: Tools Catalog
tools.subtitle: Lateral classifiers by category. Context is detailed in the expedients.

expedients.pageDescription: All open work expedients in the archive
expedients.title: Open Expedients
expedients.subtitle: Each expedient documents the engineering process: decisions, errors, refinements, and the golden scars they left behind.

collaborations.pageDescription: Record of professional collaborations and consulting
collaborations.title: Collaborations
collaborations.subtitle: Collaborative projects, consulting, and technical advisory that left golden scars in the archive.
collaborations.interestedText: Open to consulting, engineering projects, and technical collaborations. Each collaboration is a new expedient in the archive.

contact.pageDescription: Contact channels to open a new collaboration expedient
contact.title: Open New Expedient
contact.subtitle: For inquiries, job proposals, or to start a collaboration — choose the channel that best fits your request.
contact.emailDesc: Response in 24-48h. Ideal for formal proposals and technical documentation.
contact.githubDesc: Public repositories, issues, open source contributions.
contact.whatsappDesc: Only for urgent communication or real-time coordination.
contact.freelanceTip: For freelance proposals, include: scope, estimated timeline, and available budget.
contact.timezoneTip: Timezone: UTC-4 (Venezuela). Available for global remote work.

inspirations.pageDescription: Inspiration credits — the people, ideas, and resources that shaped this archive
inspirations.title: Inspirations
inspirations.subtitle: The people, ideas, tools, and philosophies that shaped the way of thinking, building, and documenting in this archive.
inspirations.epilogue: Every archive is a conversation with those who came before.

footer.built: Built with Astro · Each expedient documents engineer-level thinking

notFound.subtitle: EXPEDIENT NOT FOUND
notFound.description: This expedient does not exist in the archive, was reclassified, or the reference was written in invisible ink.
notFound.ref: REF: 404 · LOST DOCUMENT · RENY MIRELES ARCHIVE
